choices.D: Multimodal Reading Comprehension Direction: Read the passages carefully and answer questions 13 - 22. Each question is based on the information stated or implied in the passage. Then blacken the letter of your choice on the separate answer sheet provided. Reading PassageI Instruction:For questions 13-17,read the following text carefully and answer the question that follow it based on the information therein and blacken the letter of your choice on the separate answer sheet provided. Historically, British adventurism, expansionism, as well as the slave trade and Christian evangelism led to the global spread of the English language and its diverse forms.It was commanded to become the medium of intemational communication as a legacy of the British colonialism and was chauvinistically described as‘a window on the world', if not the chosen tongue. As the influence of the British Empire recedes, however,English speakers around the globe are now left to their discretion, In the past, there was a great fascination among Indians for‘pure language' Several generations of Head Masters have spent their lives instilling in the minds of students that speaking the Queen's English' was the ultimate in educational attainment. Aptitudes201S/2023 Page3 Nowadays, English is becoming more and more monolithic. In this scenario, the intemational standard variety of English will be the common factor that allows for mutual intelligibility among its Afro-Asian varieties.
